caption: A woman with dark hair, wearing black over-ear headphones and a striped button-down shirt, is captured in a medium close-up shot. She is positioned in an indoor setting, with light-colored curtains visible behind her to the left and a plain wall and surface to the right. Throughout the sequence, she looks toward the camera and speaks, with her mouth opening and closing as she talks. The on-screen text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the bottom left corner of each scene. The woman remains in a consistent position and posture across the frames, with only slight movements of her facial expressions and lips as she continues to communicate. The lighting is soft and consistent, and no other people or objects enter the frame.
